zh.lifeSummary: 當William d'Aubigny於大約1064年出生在法國崔傑奧比-素-艾時，他的父親Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny30歲，母親Adeliza De Mowbray21歲。他於1099年與Maud Bigod在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1106年登記服兵役。他在英國諾福爾可被列為lord of old buckenham, norfolk。他去世於大約1139年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可瓦易藍德享年77歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆維蒙達哈姆 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William d'Aubigny于大约1064年出生在法国崔傑奧比-素-艾时，他的父亲Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny30岁，母亲Adeliza De Mowbray21岁。他于1099年与Maud Bigod在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1106年登记服兵役。他在英国諾福爾可被列为lord of old buckenham, norfolk。他去世于大约1139年在英国英格兰諾福爾可瓦易藍德享年77岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆維蒙達哈姆 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William d'Aubigny was born about 1064, in Aubigny-sur-Nère, Cher, Centre, France, his father, Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny, was 30 and his mother, Adeliza De Mowbray, was 21. He married Maud Bigod in 1099, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1106. His occupation is listed as lord of old buckenham, norfolk in Norfolk, England. He died about 1139, in Wayland, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William d'Aubigny est né environ 1064, à Aubigny-sur-Nère, Cher, Centre, France, son père, Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adeliza De Mowbray, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Maud Bigod en 1099, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1106. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of old buckenham, norfolk à Norfolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1139, à Wayland, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William d'Aubigny um 1064 in Aubigny-sur-Nère, Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny 30 und seine Mutter Adeliza De Mowbray 21. Er hat 1099 in Norfolk, England Maud Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1106 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als lord of old buckenham, norfolk in Norfolk, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1139 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Wayland, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William d'Aubigny è nato il circa 1064 nel Aubigny-sur-Nère, Cher, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza De Mowbray, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Maud Bigod nel 1099, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1106. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of old buckenham, norfolk nel Norfolk, England. Morì circa 1139, nel Wayland, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William d'Aubignyが約1064年にフランスセントアチャーアウビグニー-スル-ンeアで生まれた時，父Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubignyは30歳，母Adeliza De Mowbrayは21歳であった。1099年にイギリスノーフォルクでMaud Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1106年に兵役登録をした。イギリスノーフォルクでの職業はlord of old buckenham, norfolkと記録されている。彼は約1139年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクワイランドで77歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムウイモンドハム アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William d'Aubigny(이)가 대략 1064년 프랑스 세트르 처 오비그니-수-e르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza De Mowbray(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1099년 영국 노르폴크에서 Maud Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1106년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국 노르폴크에서 lord of old buckenham, norfolk이었다. 그는 대략 1139년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨이랜드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 윈이몽함 윈이몽함 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William d'Aubigny nasceu aproximadamente 1064, em Aubigny-sur-Nère, Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza De Mowbray, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Bigod em 1099, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1106. Sua profissão aparece como lord of old buckenham, norfolk em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1139, em Wayland, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William d'Aubigny родился около 1064 г. в местности аубигни-сур-нeр, чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza De Mowbray, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Bigod в 1099 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1106 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии lord of old buckenham, norfolk в местности норфолк, Англия. Он умер около 1139 г. в местности веиланд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности вимондхам эбби, вимондхам, норфолк, Англия.

sm.aproximadamente 1064–aproximadamente 113: e tusa o le 1064–e tusa o le 1139

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William d'Aubigny nació aproximadamente 1064, en Aubigny-sur-Nère, Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Adeliza De Mowbray, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Maud Bigod en 1099, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1106. Su ocupación registrada era lord of old buckenham, norfolk en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1139, en Wayland, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Wymondham Abbey, Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
